name: Chow Chow Chan
desc: When your opponent activates a Normal Trap Card in response to your monster's attack declaration targeting an opponent's monster: You can discard this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card (this is a Quick Effect).
mnst_eff: When your opponent activates a Normal Trap Card in response to your monster's attack declaration targeting an opponent's monster: You can discard this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card (this is a Quick Effect).
eff: When your opponent activates a Normal Trap Card in response to your monster's attack declaration targeting an opponent's monster: You can discard this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card (this is a Quick Effect).

mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
